title: anthurium × lanceum
intro: Anthurium × lanceum, also known as the Flamingo Flower or Lady's Tears, is a hybrid plant species within the Arum family, characterized by its long-lasting, heart-shaped flowers in shades of red, pink, or white. The plant contains medicinal properties, including anthraquinones, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Consuming Anthurium × lanceum has been linked to various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with medications.
